🔒 100% private — no upload

Convert WEBP to PNG

Free, private, and instant — right in your browser.

Drag & drop your WEBP files here

🔒 Converted in your browser. Nothing is uploaded.

You downloaded an image and it came as a WebP file that your editor or an old app refuses to open. This converter turns WebP into a universally supported PNG while preserving transparency. It runs in your browser — the image is never uploaded anywhere.

How to convert

  1. Drag your WebP images into the box above.
  2. Each image is decoded by your browser and saved as PNG.
  3. Download the PNG files.

FAQ

Does this keep transparency?

Yes. PNG supports an alpha channel, so transparent areas in the WebP are preserved.

Why was my image a WebP?

Many sites serve WebP because it is smaller. Saving it locally keeps the WebP format, which some programs can't open.

Related converters

WEBP to JPGPNG to JPG
